themes.label: Presence
themes.summary: This chapter highlights God’s nearness, abiding presence, indwelling, or covenant companionship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Word-study detail reinforces "אֶל: - near, with or among; often in general, to".

themes.label: Salvation
themes.summary: This chapter speaks of rescue, deliverance, redemption, life, or being saved. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "For he found her in the field, and the betrothed damsel cried, and there was none to save her...". themes.label: Truth
themes.summary: This chapter brings truth, faithfulness, revelation, or the trustworthiness of God into focus. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "But if this thing be true, and the tokens of virginity be not found for the damsel —the law n...". Word-study detail reinforces "אֱמֶ֣ת: be true - stability; (figuratively) certainty, truth, trustworthiness".
